title: Dataset release manifest (training-data-plan.md §13)
description: Reproducible release identity under CANONICAL serialization (stable record sort, UTF-8, normalized timestamps). Explicit digests + the exact selection query + the full build lock (exporter image, query engine, schema migrations, source hashes, random seed) so a fresh machine can rebuild a byte-identical release (acceptance test 'Release reproducibility').

canonical_manifest_digest.description: Hash of the canonical serialization of THIS manifest minus this field.

selection_query.description: The exact query/manifest that chose every record.
